rationale: The citing paper treats Shiv, Carmon, and Ariely (2005) as the core prior work defining marketing placebo effects and explicitly states that it extends their model. In the theory section, it summarizes that paper's cue -> expectancy -> behavioral outcome logic and says those findings are incorporated into its own framework (including Figure 1 setup and hypothesis development). The cited work is therefore used for conceptual scaffolding and positioning of contribution, not just background listing.
relation_description: The citing paper builds directly on the cited paper's marketing placebo framework by adding neural and personality-based moderators of placebo responsiveness. It extends the original expectancy-based account to explain individual differences across multiple domains and experiments.
